consent.destructive_warning: This action is DESTRUCTIVE and cannot be undone. Are you sure?
consent.title: Allow this action?
gatekeeper.presence_required: Action requires your presence and consent: {0}
overlay.no_provider: No provider configured — open Settings to add one.
hotkey.recorder.hint_modifier: Hold a modifier (Cmd/Ctrl/Option/Shift) and press a key…
hotkey.recorder.hint_no_modifier: Add at least one modifier — e.g. Cmd or Ctrl.
sidebar.delete_confirm: Delete this conversation? This cannot be undone.
onboarding.eula.title: Condura Freeware License
onboarding.eula.intro: A free, on-device AI agent. Before we set things up, please review and accept the license.
onboarding.eula.scroll_cue: Scroll to the bottom to continue ↓
onboarding.eula.accept: I have read and accept the {0}.
onboarding.permissions.title: Grant access
onboarding.permissions.intro: Condura needs two permissions to control your computer. Grant them now for the full experience, or skip and enable later in Settings.
onboarding.permissions.why_accessibility: Lets Condura click, type, and read UI elements in other apps.
onboarding.permissions.why_screen_record: Lets Condura see your screen to understand what to do.
onboarding.hotkey.title: Set your hotkey
onboarding.hotkey.intro: Press the keys you want to use to summon Condura from anywhere. You can change this later in Settings.
onboarding.ready.title: You're all set
onboarding.ready.probing: Checking what's available on your machine…
onboarding.ready.add_provider_desc: Connect OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, or another API to start chatting → Settings
onboarding.ready.ollama_desc: A local Ollama server is running. Enable it in Settings to use your own models for free
chat.keyhint: Enter to send · Shift+Enter for newline
chat.empty.title: Welcome to Condura
chat.empty.no_provider_after: to add an API key or enable Ollama.
chat.empty.get_started: Type a message below to get started with {0}.
settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Configuration is stored in ~/.synaptic/config.yaml. Changes here write to that file via the daemon.
settings.account.title: Account
settings.account.signed_out_intro: Condura works fully without an account. Sign in to:
settings.account.benefit_1: Sync settings and skills across your devices
settings.account.benefit_2: Publish skills to the Hub under your identity
settings.account.benefit_3: Back up your encrypted data to the cloud
settings.channels.title: Channels
settings.channels.intro: Connect Telegram and other messaging channels to talk to Condura from anywhere.
settings.voice.title: Voice
settings.voice.intro: Talk to Condura hands-free with a wake word. Voice runs entirely on this machine.
settings.voice.mic_denied: Microphone access denied — grant it in OS permissions above.
settings.language.title: Language
settings.language.intro: Select your preferred language. Changes apply immediately.
settings.spend.title: Spend
settings.hotkey.title: Hotkey
settings.hotkey.intro: Press the key combination you want to use to summon the overlay. On macOS, Cmd is Super in the underlying API.
settings.hotkey.saved_alert: Hotkey saved. Restart the app to apply.
settings.update.title: Auto-update
settings.update.intro: Condura auto-updates by default. Disable here to opt out — but you'll need to update manually going forward.
settings.backup.title: Backups
settings.backup.intro: Encrypted archives are stored in ~/Documents/condura-backups (or set CONDURA_BACKUP_DIR to override).
settings.backup.restore_warning: This will replace all current data — conversations, memory, skills, settings, audit log — with the contents of {0}.
settings.backup.restore_safety: A pre-restore safety snapshot is taken automatically, so you can recover if the restored data is wrong.
settings.permissions.title: OS permissions
settings.permissions.intro: Condura needs OS permissions for accessibility, screen recording, and microphone. Grant them in System Settings if status is not granted.
settings.adaptive.title: Adaptive engine
settings.adaptive.intro: Condura learns your preferences over time — your writing style, your tool habits, the kinds of tasks you do at what time of day. It is local: nothing about you leaves this machine.
settings.adaptive.balanced: Balanced — apply safe categories (verbosity, time patterns)
settings.adaptive.learned_title: What Condura has learned about you
settings.adaptive.empty: Nothing learned yet. Use Condura for a while — preferences will appear here as the dialectic settles on confident inferences.
settings.adaptive.reset_confirm: Delete all learned inferences and start fresh? This cannot be undone.
settings.killswitch.title: Kill switch
settings.killswitch.intro: Halt every active stream and pause the daemon. Use this if an agent is doing something you don't want.
settings.killswitch.halt_confirm: Halt all daemon activity? Streaming responses will be cancelled.
settings.apikeys.title: API keys
settings.apikeys.intro: Stored encrypted in the OS keyring (or in ~/.synaptic/secrets.json with 0600 perms if the keyring is unavailable).
settings.legal.title: Legal
settings.legal.intro: Review the license you accepted during setup. The full text is also available online.
settings.setup.title: Setup
settings.setup.intro: Run the first-time setup wizard again — EULA, permissions, and hotkey. Your data is not affected.
settings.setup.rerun_confirm: Re-run the setup wizard? Your data and settings are not affected.
audit.title: Audit log
audit.intro: Every action the daemon takes is recorded here, with timestamp, actor, and outcome.
replay.title: Action Replay
replay.intro: Scrub the last 24 hours of agent activity with before/after screenshots and gatekeeper outcomes.
replay.empty: No replay frames in the last 24 hours.
about.title: About Condura
hub.title: Skills Hub
hub.intro: Search, install, and publish community skills.
hub.footer: All installs are safety-scanned (dangerous patterns, missing license, experimental trust) and verified by SHA-256 checksum. Press <kbd>Enter</kbd> in the search box to run a query; <kbd>↑</kbd> / <kbd>↓</kbd> to navigate.
hub.publish.title: Publish a skill
hub.publish.name: Name
hub.publish.author: Author
skills.title: Installed Skills
skills.subtitle: Skills that the agent can invoke. {0} installed.
skills.empty_html: No skills installed yet. Use the Hub tab to search and install community skills, or use synaptic hub search <query> from the command line.
sync.title: P2P Sync
sync.intro: Encrypted device-to-device sync (AES-256-GCM, Ed25519 identity, no central server). Devices must be explicitly paired before they can exchange data.
sync.name: Name
sync.no_peers: No peers on the LAN. Devices announce themselves periodically via UDP broadcast. This list refreshes every 5 seconds.
sync.no_paired: No paired devices. Pair a discovered peer to start syncing.
sync.revoke_confirm: Revoke device {0}? Future sync attempts will be rejected.
sync.pair.title: Pair with {0}
sync.pair.qr_alt: This device's pairing identity QR code
sync.pair.qr_cap: This is {0}. Scan from the other device, or compare the PIN below.
channels.title: Channels
channels.intro: Connect a messaging channel to talk to Condura from anywhere. Messages are routed through the daemon on this machine — nothing runs in the cloud.
channels.empty: No channels connected yet. Connect Telegram below to get started.
channels.telegram_intro_html: Create a bot with @BotFather, copy the HTTP API token it gives you, and paste it here.
channels.invalid_token_html: That doesn't look like a Telegram bot token (expected digits:secret).
channels.disconnect_confirm: Disconnect {0}? Condura will stop receiving messages from it.
account.signin.title: Sign in
account.signin.lead: Condura works fully without an account. Sign in to sync settings across devices, publish skills, and back up encrypted to the cloud.
account.signin.setup_hint: Sign in with OAuth isn't configured on this machine. Either enter your email below for a magic link, or ask your admin to set CONDURA_ACCOUNT_OAUTH_GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID (and/or …_GITHUB_CLIENT_ID, …_APPLE_CLIENT_ID) and restart Condura.
account.signin.check_inbox: Check your inbox — we sent a one-time sign-in link to {0}.
account.signin.fineprint: By continuing you agree to the End-User License Agreement. Your local data never leaves your machine unless you enable sync.
pending.title: Pending sub-agent actions
pending.description: When a sub-agent asks to do something on your computer, the request sits here until you approve or deny. Approved actions are executed through the same safety layer as everything else; nothing the sub-agent says is trusted without your click.
pending.empty: No sub-agent actions yet. Spawn a sub-agent from the Delegation page.
delegation.title: Sub-agent Delegation
delegation.intro: Condura can spawn a sub-agent to handle parts of a task. The sub-agent runs as a separate subprocess and is gated by the same safety layer you trust for everything else.
delegation.available_intro: These CLIs must be installed and on your $PATH. Condura detects them automatically; missing binaries are listed below.
delegation.no_agents: No sub-agents detected. Install Claude Code, Codex, or another CLI to enable delegation.
delegation.task_placeholder: What do you want the sub-agent to do?
